CVE-2021-3657.title: A flaw was found in mbsync versions prior to 1.4.4. Due to inadeq ...
CVE-2021-3657.description: A flaw was found in mbsync versions prior to 1.4.4. Due to inadequate handling of extremely large (>=2GiB) IMAP literals, malicious or compromised IMAP servers, and hypothetically even external email senders, could cause several different buffer overflows, which could conceivably be exploited for remote code execution.

CVE-2021-44143.title: A flaw was found in mbsync in isync 1.4.0 through 1.4.3. Due to a ...
CVE-2021-44143.description: A flaw was found in mbsync in isync 1.4.0 through 1.4.3. Due to an unchecked condition, a malicious or compromised IMAP server could use a crafted mail message that lacks headers (i.e., one that starts with an empty line) to provoke a heap overflow, which could conceivably be exploited for remote code execution.
